name: pycortex-roidraw
description: Pycortex WebGL viewer with in-browser ROI drawing + editing + export. Modular: pure core / viewer adapter / UI.

scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:py
scripts.test:py: python3 test/test_bake.py && python3 test/test_fixups.py && python3 test/test_add_help.py && python3 test/test_reengine.py && python3 test/test_convert_huth.py
